course_history_year_range_note: Royal Birkdale last hosted in 2017 (Jordan Spieth wins). Fallback to all event_id=100 history. Years at Royal Birkdale: 1998, 2008, 2017.
course_history_note: The Open Championship rotates courses. Royal Birkdale hosted 1998, 2008, 2017. Apollo should filter by course key 541 (Birkdale) or use all event_id=100 history with course_name filter.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. MAJOR event. Expand field to 156 players.

sg_weights._note: Royal Birkdale: Links course, fescue greens, wind-exposed. OTT important for positioning, APP for iron play in wind. Putting historically less decisive at The Open.

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights. Royal Birkdale 2017 history available — if coverage >50% consider raising to 0.25/0.20.

course_notes: Royal Birkdale Golf Club, Southport, England. Par-72, ~7300y. Major championship. Hosted The Open in 1998 (Mark O'Meara), 2008 (Padraig Harrington), 2017 (Jordan Spieth). Links-style fescue greens, exposed to Merseyside coastal winds. Winner archetype: Complete ball-strikers with links experience who manage wind. Check if Scottish Open/Genesis Scottish Open experience (Renaissance Club links) is predictive.
winner_archetype: Links-experienced, wind-resistant ball-striker with strong off-the-tee and approach play. Players with British Isles course experience and historical Open/Scottish Open success. Major-specific: expand BBI field to 60+ players, apply ceiling+leverage boost (per PGA Championship improvement suggestion).

major_flags.contrarian_weight_note: Consider reducing contrarian from 0.05 to 0.01 for majors (chalk often wins links Opens)
major_flags.ceiling_boost: Per week-15 suggestion, ceiling from 0.05→0.08 at majors
